entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "Bahaskan cita-cita dengan Steve Jobs"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "Bahaskan dasar iklim dengan Greta Thunberg"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "Bahaskan keadilan dengan Batman"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Berdebat Dengan Personaliti di inspir bagi pembelajaran hujah, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Hujah

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: Pilih a personality.

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: Berdebat dengan personaliti

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Berdebat Dengan Personaliti Using AI ialah berfokus way untuk use AI untuk pembelajaran bukannya passive jawapan collection. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Name real atau fictional personality dan debate mereka di any topik. AI channels mereka awam style dan worldview sambil keeping debate fair.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Berdebat Dengan Personaliti Menggunakan AI: praktikal panduan

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Pelajar yang mahukan latihan debat yang rancak dengan suara yang diingati dan cabaran yang adil.

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: Latihan rebuttals.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: Set a topik.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Berdebat Dengan Personaliti. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Bahaskan Sebarang Topik. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Debat ini menggunakan gaya dan pandangan dunia awam tanpa berpura-pura mengetahui kepercayaan peribadi.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Berdebat Dengan Personaliti apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
